title: lastrea lorentzii
intro: Lastrea lorentzii, also known as the Lorentz's fern or Lastrea fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea lorentzii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
